title: International social security agreements and the Canada Pension Plan - Canada.ca
content:
## International social security agreements and the Canada Pension Plan
If you are an employer who sends employees abroad or if you are a self-employed worker who provides services abroad and you contribute to the Canada Pension Plan (CPP), international social security agreements can help your business.
- What is the purpose of international social security agreements? Table of countries that have an agreement with Canada
- Certificate of coverage Who can apply? How to apply
Who can apply? How to apply
- Social security agreements and the Quebec Pension Plan

## Forms and publications
- To get an application form for a certificate of coverage, go to Countries that have an agreement with Canada and select the form number for the country of detachment.
- Information Circular IC84-6, Canada – United States Social Security Agreement
- Canada's international social security agreements
- Employment outside Canada
